title: Civil vs Common Law: The Civil Code is codified into one rule book in...
summary: Evaluate whether the Civil Code of Quebec is codified into a single comprehensive rule book.
prompt: The Civil Code is codified into one rule book in Quebec.
solution: The Civil Code in Quebec is a comprehensive codification of laws dealing with matters of civil law, including obligations, property, and family law. It serves as the primary source of private legal rules in Quebec, guiding civil-related legal matters. This codification contrasts with the common law system used in other provinces in Canada.
